# JL Tours Boston

> Bilingual (Spanish & English) guided bus tours departing from East Boston, MA to top
> destinations across the U.S. Northeast. Hispanic-owned, family-friendly company with 32+
> years of experience (founded 1994), US DOT #3866673, recognized by the State of
> Massachusetts and Boston City Hall. Booking is done directly via WhatsApp — no complicated
> online reservations.

## Company details

- Legal name: JL Tours Inc
- US DOT registration: #3866673
- Founded: 1994 (32+ years of experience)
- Address: East Boston, MA 02128, USA (Greater Boston)
- Phone / WhatsApp: +1 857-389-9523
- Business hours: Monday–Sunday, 9:00 AM – 7:00 PM
- Languages: Spanish and English
- Price range: $190 – $430 USD per person (some tours by quote)
- Areas served: East Boston, Chelsea, Revere, Lynn, Everett, and Greater Boston, MA

## Tours

- [Niagara Falls / Cataratas del Niágara](https://jltoursboston.com/tours/cataratas-niagara/)
- [New York Complete / Nueva York Completa](https://jltoursboston.com/tours/nueva-york-completa/)
- [New York VIP](https://jltoursboston.com/tours/nueva-york-vip/)
- [Atlantic City & Philadelphia](https://jltoursboston.com/tours/atlantic-city-philadelphia/)
- [Washington D.C.](https://jltoursboston.com/tours/washington-dc/)
- [Hindu Temple & New Jersey / Templo Hindú & New Jersey](https://jltoursboston.com/tours/templo-hindu-new-jersey/)
- [Howe Caverns, New York / Cavernas de Nueva York](https://jltoursboston.com/tours/cavernas-nueva-york/)
- [Family Parks / Parques Familiares](https://jltoursboston.com/tours/parques-familiares/)
